chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-166 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on M.A. 9266/2019 2. For orders on M.A. 9267/2019 30.08.2022 Mr. Wali Muhammad Khoso, advocate for surety. Mr. Niaz Hussain Meerani, Special Prosecutor NAB. ----- 1. Granted. 2. Through this application, the applicant/surety seeks return of surety papers furnished by him in this case. Learned Special Prosecutor NAB after going through the record has endorsed no objection for return of surety documents by stating that since interim bail granted to the petitioner on 26.01.2017 has been recalled on 29.08.2019, the surety papers are no more required by this Court. Accordingly, this application is allowed and the office is directed to return the surety documents to the surety after proper verification and identification as per rules. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
